# hetzner

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Hetzner Cloud SSH provider: detects console.hetzner.com console URLs so the SSH setup section can name Hetzner and tell the user how to reach a root shell in its web terminal. Console prose only — the key flow belongs to ssh-setup.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `SshProvider` "Hetzner"
  - Uses:
    - `apps/deploy/ssh-setup.SshProvider`
    - `primitives/css/text.Text`
    - `primitives/setup-steps.StepNote`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
